## Palantir Strikes Two New Alliances — Latin America Expansion and SAP Integration Projects

The SAP tie-in may be the more durable signal — embedding PLTR workflows into the SAP installed base could be a meaningful distribution lever; the LatAm sovereign deals broaden geographic diversification of government revenue, reducing US-contract concentration risk.

- Palantir announced two new alliance deals: geographic expansion into Latin America and an integration partnership tied to SAP projects.
- The LatAm deals extend PLTR's sovereign and enterprise AI deployment footprint beyond the US and Europe.
- The SAP alliance signals integration into a major enterprise ERP ecosystem, potentially unlocking a large installed-base addressable market.
- High-confidence classification; both deals are additive to the enterprise and sovereign AI thesis.
